to surround or enclose with (instr.),  Śulb. ;

Pass. -cīyate, to be increased or augmented, to grow,  Ragh.

results.rendered_html:
parici
I. 5 U.
1 To heap up, accumulate.
2 To know;  Mv. 7. 11. 
3 To get, acquire.
4 To increase.
5 To cover or fill with.
II. 3 P.
1 To practise, familiarize oneself with.
2 To become acquainted with.
3 Ved. To examine, investigate.
— Caus. To search, seek for.
— Pass. To grow, be developed;  R. 3. 24.
